en.name: Level 23 — The Petrified Garden
en.shortDescription: A planetoid-sized superorganism of interwoven ancient trees, with bioluminescent caverns and ruins that mimic classical Frontrooms structures.
en.atmosphere: Dense shadowy canopy in perpetual twilight; underground glow-rooms pulse with eerie light amid petrified wood and forgotten ruins.
en.tips: Never say 'it's only a matter of time' — it wakes buried sentries. Shelter at Base Seedling, which holds the main exit. Don't harm the Green Giants.
